command:
rm -rf .tmp/device-app-library-check
mkdir -p .tmp/device-app-library-check
xcrun devicectl device copy from --device "wwz 的 iphone" --domain-type appDataContainer --domain-identifier com.popcornnnnnn.privatemoments --source Library --destination .tmp/device-app-library-check --timeout 60

command:
db='.tmp/device-app-library-check/Application Support/PrivateMoments/private-moments.sqlite'
if [ -f "$db" ]; then
  sqlite3 "$db" "SELECT 'local_comments_total', COUNT(*) FROM local_comments; SELECT 'local_comments_visible', COUNT(*) FROM local_comments WHERE deletedAt IS NULL; SELECT 'outbox_total', COUNT(*) FROM outbox_operations; SELECT 'outbox_comment_ops', COUNT(*) FROM outbox_operations WHERE operationType IN ('create_comment','delete_comment'); SELECT 'outbox_comment_pending', COUNT(*) FROM outbox_operations WHERE operationType IN ('create_comment','delete_comment') AND status <> 'synced';"
else
  echo "device sqlite missing: $db" >&2
  exit 2
fi

command:
db='.tmp/device-app-library-check/Application Support/PrivateMoments/private-moments.sqlite'
sqlite3 "$db" "SELECT 'local_comments_total', COUNT(*) FROM local_comments; SELECT 'local_comments_visible', COUNT(*) FROM local_comments WHERE deletedAt IS NULL; SELECT 'outbox_total', COUNT(*) FROM outbox_operations; SELECT 'outbox_comment_ops', COUNT(*) FROM outbox_operations WHERE type IN ('create_comment','delete_comment'); SELECT 'outbox_comment_pending', COUNT(*) FROM outbox_operations WHERE type IN ('create_comment','delete_comment') AND status <> 'synced';"

for db in server/data/app.sqlite server/prisma/dev.db; do
  echo "DB:$db"
  sqlite3 "$db" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('comments','sync_operations');"
  sqlite3 "$db" "SELECT 'comments_total', COUNT(*) FROM comments; SELECT 'comments_visible', COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE deletedAt IS NULL; SELECT 'sync_operation_comment_ops', COUNT(*) FROM sync_operations WHERE type IN ('create_comment','delete_comment');" 2>&1 || true
done
